name: dev.ucp.shopping.marketing_consent
title: Marketing Consent Extension
description: Extends Checkout with per-channel marketing consent capture, supporting both platform-collected and business-requested consent flows.

marketing_consent_option.description: A marketing channel the business offers for opt-in.

display_text.description: Human-readable description of what the buyer consents to receive.

privacy_policy_url.description: URL to the business's privacy policy for this consent.

marketing_consent_entry.description: The buyer's opt-in decision for a marketing channel.

channel.description: Channel matching a marketing_consent_option channel value.

opted_in.description: Whether the buyer consented to marketing on this channel.

marketing_consent.description: Marketing consent options declared by the business and consent decisions submitted by the platform.

options.description: Marketing channels the business offers for opt-in. Business includes this in checkout responses. Platform reads but never sends.

consents.description: Buyer's marketing consent decisions. Omission preserves current subscription state.

buyer.title: Buyer with Marketing Consent
buyer.description: Buyer object extended with marketing consent.

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Marketing Consent
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout extended with per-channel marketing consent.
